description: Deliver a deterministic cloud worker execution pipeline for run, auto, and review workflows with atomic claim semantics, workflow-aware final snapshots, optional GitHub PR creation, worker CLI wiring, and stable cloud command contracts.

userStories.title: Fix atomic claim attempt counting in store adapters
userStories.description: As a platform maintainer, I want ClaimRun to atomically claim runs and increment attempt_count so that retry budgeting and attempt numbering remain deterministic.
acceptanceCriteria: internal/cloud/postgres/store.go ClaimRun updates eligible runs by setting status='claimed' and attempt_count=attempt_count+1 atomically.
internal/cloud/turso/store.go ClaimRun performs equivalent atomic status and attempt_count updates.
Claim eligibility remains restricted to status='queued' and cancel_requested=false.
Store adapter tests verify attempt_count increments exactly once per successful claim and does not increment on failed claim attempts.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add shared shell escaping helper for cloud command construction
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a single shell escaping helper so that cloud command construction is safe and consistent across services.
acceptanceCriteria: Add internal/cloud/shell.go with a shared single-quote shell escaping helper.
auth_materialization.go uses the shared helper when building credential write commands.
PR command construction uses the shared helper for all user-controlled segments (title, body, head, base, repo).
Escaping behavior tests cover the shared helper and updated callsites.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement workflow-aware sandbox bundle collection
userStories.description: As a cloud user, I want final artifact collection to be workflow-aware so that pull and restore include the correct files.
acceptanceCriteria: Add internal/cloud/snapshot_collect.go with CollectSandboxBundle(...) that scans files under /workspace/.hal.
Collected file paths are normalized to workspace-relative paths.
Collection filtering uses WorkflowDefaultArtifactPatterns(workflowKind) rather than input bundle allowlists.
File content capture uses a base64 command path that avoids wrapped output corruption and returns explicit errors on command failure.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement bundle compression and hash semantics for snapshots
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want deterministic snapshot compression and hashing so that bundle storage and restore stay compatible.
acceptanceCriteria: snapshot_collect.go provides CompressBundle(...) using path\x00size\x00content framing plus gzip compression.
Compressed output is compatible with existing cmd/cloud.go decompression behavior.
Snapshot SHA is computed as ComputeBundleHash(records) and not as a hash of compressed bytes.
Round-trip tests assert decompress compatibility and deterministic hash behavior.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add worker-side GitHub PR creator
userStories.description: As an operator, I want worker-side PR creation to use sandbox credentials so that auto and review workflows can open PRs safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Add internal/cloud/pr_github.go with GitHubPRCreator(r runner.Runner, sandboxID, authDir string) PRCreator.
Creator executes gh pr create in /workspace and returns parsed PR URL/reference on success.
Command exports GITHUB_TOKEN from ${authDir}/credentials during sandbox execution.
title/body/head/base/repo arguments are escaped using the shared shell helper.
Runner errors and non-zero exits are returned as wrapped actionable errors.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create WorkerPipeline core types and no-work behavior
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a testable WorkerPipeline core so that orchestration logic is independent from Cobra handlers.
acceptanceCriteria: Add internal/cloud/worker.go defining WorkerPipelineConfig, WorkerPipeline, NewWorkerPipeline, and ErrNoWork.
ProcessOne(ctx) claims one run and returns ErrNoWork when the store returns ErrNotFound.
Unit tests cover no-work and successful claim flow for ProcessOne.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement deterministic worker setup orchestration
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want executeAttempt setup ordering to be deterministic so that run lifecycle behavior is predictable.
acceptanceCriteria: executeAttempt transitions run claimed->running before provisioning starts.
Setup order is provision -> bootstrap -> auth materialization -> preflight.
Failure helper accepts fromRunStatus and TransitionRun uses that provided source status instead of a hardcoded value.
workingBranch := WorkingBranch(runID) is computed and passed into bootstrap/checkpoint inputs with expected git credential fields.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Route heartbeat, cancel, and revocation across full attempt lifecycle
userStories.description: As a worker operator, I want heartbeat and cancellation handling active across setup and execution so that long-running attempts remain consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Heartbeat loop starts after run enters running and continues through setup and execution completion.
Each heartbeat tick executes cancel.CheckAndCancel before heartbeat.Renew.
Cancel reason is tracked with atomic-safe state and routed deterministically to canceled, lease_lost, profile_revoked, or unknown.
lease_lost routing avoids duplicate terminal transitions while still allowing cleanup and retry evaluation.
profile_revoked routing finalizes run state consistently after revocation handling.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement deterministic terminal cleanup and state transitions
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want terminal cleanup to be deterministic so that run, attempt, and lock states remain consistent during shutdown.
acceptanceCriteria: Cleanup uses background timeout contexts when parent context is canceled.
Exit code 0 produces exactly one attempt-succeeded transition and one run-succeeded transition.
Non-zero exit produces exactly one attempt-failed(non_retryable) transition and one run-failed transition.
cancel, lease_lost, and profile_revoked paths avoid duplicate attempt terminalization.
Auth lock release treats ErrNotFound as non-fatal when lock was already released.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Persist final snapshots and gate PR side effects by workflow
userStories.description: As an operator, I want final snapshot persistence and PR side effects to be workflow-aware so that terminalization is correct for run, auto, and review.
acceptanceCriteria: Post-execution checkpoint/writeback steps run best-effort and do not block terminalization.
Final snapshot persistence stores collected records, compressed payload, and ComputeBundleHash(records) SHA.
PR creation is attempted only when workflowKind is auto or review and PREnabled is true.
workflowKind run never invokes PR creation.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add hal cloud worker command and injectable factory wiring
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a dedicated cloud worker command so that queue processing can run with configurable runtime dependencies.
acceptanceCriteria: Add cmd/cloud_worker.go registering hal cloud worker under the cloud command.
Command exposes --worker-id, --poll-interval, --reconcile-interval, --timeout-interval, and --sandbox-image flags.
Package-level store and runner factories use if-nil defaults and remain overrideable in tests.
Default runner factory validates deploy config and creates a Daytona-backed implementation satisfying Runner, SessionExec, and GitOps interfaces.
Worker wiring passes ProvisionConfig.Image from --sandbox-image or a non-empty default.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement worker loop scheduling and graceful shutdown
userStories.description: As an operator, I want the worker command loop to coordinate polling and maintenance tickers so that runtime behavior is predictable and safe.
acceptanceCriteria: Worker run helper schedules ProcessOne, reconciler, and timeout services using ticker-based loops.
Main loop exits cleanly on context cancellation without leaked goroutines.
Startup and shutdown behavior is deterministic in tests with injected dependencies.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add tests for snapshot collection, PR creator, and claim semantics
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want targeted tests for snapshot and PR helpers so that regressions in artifact and PR behavior are caught early.
acceptanceCriteria: internal/cloud/snapshot_collect_test.go covers happy path, empty workspace, filtering behavior, command failures, and compress/decompress hash assertions.
internal/cloud/pr_github_test.go covers success, non-zero exit, runner error, escaping behavior, and token sourcing.
Claim/store tests are updated to validate atomic attempt_count increments for Postgres and Turso.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add tests for worker orchestration and worker CLI
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want high-confidence worker orchestration and CLI tests so that failure routing and command behavior remain stable.
acceptanceCriteria: internal/cloud/worker_test.go covers happy path, no work, setup failure, non-zero execution, cancel, lease_lost, profile_revoked, PR skip-for-run, and no duplicate attempt transitions.
cmd/cloud_worker_test.go covers flag/default wiring and startup/shutdown command behavior.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Keep cloud output, JSON contracts, and redaction behavior stable
userStories.description: As an automation consumer, I want existing cloud command contracts to remain stable so that adding worker support does not break integrations.
acceptanceCriteria: Existing status/logs/pull/cancel/auth output contracts remain unchanged for human-readable output.
Existing cloud lifecycle JSON contract tests remain green with canonical camelCase keys.
Redaction assertions remain green in both human and --json paths.
Help/command tree tests only change for intentional worker subcommand addition.
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
